productName: lil' Rays - Raspberry Lemonade - 100mg THC : 20mg CBD : 20mg CBG : 20mg CBN : 20mg CBC
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet-tart lemonade notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect. Best enjoyed cold, with plenty of time for the infused finish to arrive.
